title: Secret Tape of UFO ‘Invasion of Washington’ Briefing to Be Released
description: A long-hidden tape recording of a 1952 UFO briefing involving top Air Force officials and scientists may soon be released to the public, according to Rep. Eric Burlison (R-MO). Burlison revealed the development during remarks to UFO transparency advocates at Disclosure Forum 2026.
